title: Those Magnificent Men in Their Flying Machines or How I Flew from London to Paris in 25 Hours 11 Minutes
actors: Stuart Whitman, Sarah Miles, James Fox
plot: Hoping to push Britain to the forefront of aviation, a London publisher organizes an international air race across the English Channel, but must contend with two entrants vying for his daughter, as well as national rivalries and c...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 8 nominations total
